phase_name: Sessions 35-39: Complete attack surface map of Connes Q_W positivity

remaining_tasks.name: Construct arithmetic Hodge star from scaling site geometry
Formalize unconditional results (digamma asymptotic, prime neutrality) in Lean 4

blockers.description: Every Fourier-symmetric operator commutes with M and mirrors its sign (wrong direction). The Hodge star must break Fourier symmetry using arithmetic.
The arithmetic Hodge star is the Connes-Consani program. Not yet constructed by anyone.

decisions.decision: Hilbert transform J is wrong Hodge star
decisions.rationale: [J,M]/anti-comm = 4.3%. J commutes with M, so Hermitian form h~2M reflects sign instead of causing it.
All computational approaches exhausted. Remaining step is pure mathematics: arithmetic Hodge star on scaling site.

next_action: Pure analysis: read CCM papers, attempt arithmetic Hodge star construction. Or: formalize proved results in Lean 4. Or: new direction entirely.
context_notes: Sessions 35-39 mapped the complete attack surface of RH via Connes Q_W positivity. Killed: M_diag domination, tropical lift, zero-free region, Toeplitz, spectral representation, strong convergence (circular), SOS factorization, Lefschetz commutators, Hilbert Hodge star. Proved: digamma asymptotic (coeff -1), prime near-neutrality, exponential compression (361->7.5M). Discovered: Q_W>=0 is NOT a tautology, eigenvalue is exactly zero (silent modes), the spectral gap is 10^8x beyond standard bounds. The wall: the arithmetic Hodge star that breaks Fourier symmetry. 27 commits, ~10K lines of Python across sessions 35-39.
